creator: linpct@gmail.com
text:
Dear Frederic,

    Thanks a lot, I've sent another mail to contact sylvio@. :-)

On Mon, Aug 2, 2010 at 4:18 PM, Frederic Culot <frederic@culot.org> wrote:

> A PR was already opened for the update of tmux to 1.3 (PR 148835).
> sylvio@ said he committed the patch and then closed the PR on July 26
> but apparently no commit was done.
> It could be helpful to check with him what happened with the previous
> patch.
>
> Frederic
>



-- 
Daniel Lin (pct)
